title: cuscuta stenocalycina
intro: Cuscuta stenocalycina, also known as Dodder, is a parasitic flowering plant that belongs to the Cuscuta genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Cuscuta stenocalycina include reducing swelling and pain, improving blood circulation, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cuscuta stenocalycina include tea infusions, tinctures, and capsules, often used in Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
